items.raw_desc: Légycsapó Verk 24610 Elektromos légycsapó UV fénnyel, 2in1, fehér:The modern Verk 24610 electric insect trap with built-in UV lamp allows you to quickly get rid of flies, mosquitoes and other insects - day or night. It runs on a built-in battery and conveniently charges via the USB-C port, making it ideal for the home, garden, tent or balcony. The device has two independent modes: ON1 - the trap activates the anti-shock net at the push of a button - a safe solution for manual use. ON2 - the trap works automatically. In trap mode, the net remains active at all times and the UV light is also activated, which attracts insects. The trap is equipped with a rechargeable battery that is charged via USB, so there is no need to change the battery. The LED indicates the operating status and charging status. A fully charged trap can last for many hours and thus provides continuous protection against insects. A készítménybiológiailag lebomló és nem mérgező, megfelelő használat mellett alkalmas a hagyományos fém és kerámia lefolyókhoz. items.raw_desc: Olajszívó AMIO folyadékszívó, 200 ml:The AMIO professional extractor is designed for extracting or changing fluids such as brake fluid, coolant, oil or power steering fluid. It is primarily intended for refilling or extracting operating fluids from external containers or reservoirs in various machines and equipment. The set contains two hoses with lengths of 190 mm and 197 mm with diameters of 5/16'' and 1/4''. The piston is equipped with a seal made of high-quality rubber that is resistant to long-term contact with oil and grease. All seals are manufactured with maximum precision and allow working even at high pressure. The extractor is equipped with a venting system that equalizes the pressure under the piston, ensuring smooth and efficient operation. The semi-transparent cylinder makes it easy to check the quantity and condition of the liquid. Ideally suited for use on quad bikes, boats, agricultural technology, industrial gearboxes, cars, caravans and other machines.
